THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATHAM VALERIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARL SCHIEB OF CALIFORNIA INC. $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
